Custom Sportswear Manufacturer: Build Your Performance Apparel Brand From 50 Pieces

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 11 min read
Home / Blog / Custom Sportswear Manufacturer: Build Your Performance Apparel Brand From 50 Pieces

The global sportswear market exceeds $350 billion and continues to grow. Independent brands like Gymshark, NOBULL, and Alphalete proved that you don't need massive capital to build a successful sportswear label — you need the right manufacturer, the right products, and the right positioning. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture custom sportswear from 50 pieces with performance fabrics, professional construction, and complete private label branding.

The Sportswear Market in 2026 — Opportunity for Independent Brands

Athleisure and performance wear have become the dominant fashion category. Consumers wear gym clothes to coffee shops, running errands, and working from home. This "athleisure everywhere" trend means sportswear brands sell to customers who never set foot in a gym.

For independent brands, the opportunity is clear: niche down within sportswear (CrossFit-specific, yoga-focused, running-optimized), build a loyal community, and scale through repeat purchases. Sportswear has the highest customer lifetime value in apparel because customers buy multiple pieces and replace them regularly.

Sportswear Products FABRIOZA Manufactures

  • Gym Sets: Matching shorts or leggings with sports bra or crop top — the hero product for most gym wear brands
  • Compression Shorts and Tights: Graduated compression for performance and recovery
  • Training Hoodies and Zip-Ups: Pre and post-workout layering pieces
  • Tracksuits and Jogger Sets: Premium matching top and bottom — high-margin products
  • Running Tops and Singlets: Lightweight, breathable, high-visibility options
  • Performance Jackets: Windbreakers and lightweight shells
  • Custom Yoga Wear: High-waist leggings, supportive bras, flowing tops
  • Martial Arts Apparel: Rash guards, fight shorts, training gear
  • Sublimation Sports Jerseys: All-over print for soccer, basketball, cricket, esports

Performance Fabrics — What Makes Sportswear Different

Sportswear fabric selection determines performance, comfort, and durability. FABRIOZA sources all performance fabrics locally in Sialkot's supply chain:

  • Polyester-Spandex Blends (88/12): 4-way stretch, moisture-wicking, quick-dry. The standard for gym wear.
  • Nylon-Spandex Blends (82/18): Softer hand feel, preferred for leggings and yoga wear.
  • Compression Fabric: Graduated compression technology for muscle support and circulation.
  • Mesh Panels: Strategic ventilation zones for temperature regulation.
  • French Terry: Post-workout loungewear with premium feel.

Customization Options for Sportswear Brands

  • Sublimation Printing: Unlimited colors, all-over designs — ideal for team jerseys
  • Embroidery: Chest logos, sleeve branding — premium and durable
  • Screen Printing: Cost-effective for 1-4 color designs on larger orders
  • Heat Transfer: Detailed graphics, reflective elements
  • Private Label Branding: Woven labels, hangtags, branded polybags

Gym Wear Brand — How to Build One From Scratch Using FABRIOZA

  1. Choose Your Market: Women's gym wear, men's bodybuilding, CrossFit, yoga, running
  2. Define Your Aesthetic: Minimal, bold, technical, lifestyle — your visual identity
  3. Select 2-3 Hero Products: Start with your signature piece (e.g., high-waist leggings + sports bra set)
  4. Brief FABRIOZA: Share fabric preferences, design references, and branding requirements
  5. Approve Samples: Test fit, performance, and quality during actual workouts
  6. Launch With 50-100 Units: Test demand, gather feedback, iterate

Why FABRIOZA for Custom Sportswear?

ISO 9001 certified quality, 50-piece MOQ, full private label branding, factory-direct pricing from Pakistan, and DDP shipping to over 30 countries. Our location in Sialkot — a city with decades of sportswear manufacturing expertise — means we understand performance apparel at a level that generalist factories cannot match.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I order different sportswear styles in one 50-piece order?

The 50-piece minimum applies per style, but you can order multiple styles in the same shipment to save on shipping costs.

What fabric is best for women's gym leggings?

Nylon-spandex blend (82/18) offers the best combination of softness, stretch, and opacity. For budget-conscious brands, polyester-spandex (88/12) performs excellently at a lower price point.

Can you produce matching gym sets at 50pcs MOQ?

Yes, each piece of the set (top and bottom) needs its own 50-piece minimum. We can coordinate production so both pieces ship together.

Do you manufacture sublimation sports jerseys for teams?

Yes, sublimation is one of our specialties. Perfect for team uniforms, cycling kits, and all-over print designs.

How do I brief FABRIOZA if I don't have performance fabric experience?

Send us design references from brands you admire. Our team recommends the right fabrics based on your product type and target price.
